summary: Bug-fix iteration for 4 Home tab UI bugs. Backend regression: 23/23 pytest passed including 3 new regression cases (test_zodiacs image field, test_home_dashboard_leo_concerns_have_images, test_home_dashboard_panchang_shape). Frontend UI (390x844 mobile viewport, phone login +15550002222 / OTP 123456): (Bug#1) All 12 zodiac cards render as circular photo cards with data-testid home-zodiac-. Leo card has 1 with Unsplash src; tapping Leo updated hero card to 'TODAY · Jul 23 - Aug 22 / Leo'. (Bug#2) All 8 concern cards (love, career, marriage, money, health, family, education, spiritual) render as image cards (imgs:1, svgs:0 — no icon), 104x104 in 3-col grid, with dark-gradient label overlay confirmed via screenshot. (Bug#3) Panchang is a compact horizontal ribbon: header shows date + 'Shubh' pill; 6 pill cells (Tithi/Nakshatra/Sunrise/Sunset/Abhijit/Rahu Kaal) visible in horizontal ScrollView. (Bug#4) Tab bar respects safe-area insets — _layout.tsx uses useSafeAreaInsets() with paddingBottom Math.max(insets.bottom,16) and height 60+bottomPad; in 390x844 viewport tab labels bottom=819 (25px clearance), all 5 tabs (Home/Astrologers/Chats/Kundli/Profile) visible and clickable; navigation Home→Chats→Home works. No deprecated Expo packages (no expo-av/expo-barcode-scanner/expo-background-fetch). No red screen errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Zodiac image URLs are duplicated between frontend const ZODIAC (index.tsx lines 14-27) and backend ZODIAC[] (server.py lines 190-201). Frontend still uses its own local const rather than reading z.image from GET /api/zodiacs response — the backend image field is present but unused by the Home screen. Minor DRY concern; consider consuming the API field for a single source of truth.
server.py is 880 lines — approaching the 700-line limit noted in prior review; consider splitting into routers when adding more features.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_aura_backend.py (added 3 regression tests: zodiac image URL, home-dashboard concerns image URL, panchang shape)
seed_data_creation: Ephemeral phone user +15550002222 / OTP 123456 for UI login (mock OTP, no cleanup needed). Backend pytest uses TEST_-prefixed random phones.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Home tab testIDs: 'home-zodiac-<Sign>' (12 cards, Sign = Aries..Pisces), 'concern-<key>' (8 cards: love/career/marriage/money/health/family/education/spiritual), 'home-hero-card', 'card-of-the-day'. Login flow unchanged from iteration_1. Note: Panchang cell KEY labels are uppercased via CSS text-transform, so page.get_by_text('Tithi', exact=True) will FAIL — use case-insensitive matching or the pill's parent testID if adding future tests. Zodiac image URLs are hard-coded on the FRONTEND (index.tsx lines 14-27); the backend GET /api/zodiacs also returns image URLs but frontend does not consume them.
rca_of_issue: N/A — all 4 bug fixes verified working. No new issues introduced.
